name: Xevious
description: Xevious is a vertically scrolling arcade shooter. The player controls a fighter craft called the Solvalou as it flies over a landscape, battling enemies that approach from the air and the ground. The gameplay involves continuous forward scrolling, with waves of enemies appearing in patterns. The player can fire both forward-facing projectiles at aerial targets and drop bombs onto ground-based enemies, which require more precise targeting due to a targeting reticle. The Solvalou can move freely within the lower portion of the screen. The game is known for its challenging difficulty and relentless enemy attack patterns. Hidden towers and other secrets can be found by bombing specific locations on the ground. The game features a number of different enemies with different attack patterns and movement speeds.
